title: senecio vulneraria
intro: Senecio vulneraria, also known as wolf's bane or autograph plant, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Senecio vulneraria include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Senecio vulneraria can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in folk medicine as a poultice to apply directly to the affected area.
